intro: Decamerium frondosum, also known as Kluva or Kuvva, is a medicinal plant species native to the tropical regions of Sri Lanka and India, commonly used in Ayurvedic medicine. The health benefits of Decamerium frondosum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties.
